mission.title: dragonfly: Improvement of Security Joint Assessment
mission.description: Improvement of Security Joint Assessment. Community-requested feature.

steps.title: Check current dragonfly deployment
steps.description:
Verify your dragonfly version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
helm list -n dragonfly 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working dragonfly installation.

steps.title: Review dragonfly configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant dragonfly configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
kubectl get configmap -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=dragonfly
```
### Feature request:

Refer to: https://github.com/cncf/tag-security/pull/1443, https://github.com/cncf/toc/issues/1358

steps.title: Apply the fix for Improvement of Security Joint Assessment
steps.description:
The project seems to overly trust different components in its architecture.   It would be helpful to do things like ensure non-repudiation via signing many types of data that are sent.   For instance, the secure hashes about which content to retrieve are only protected with transport layer security.   If something goes wrong and a client has incorrect hash information, it is not possible to tell where the issue occurred without signed metadata from the manager.   (Note that this is an isolated

See the source issue for community-verified solutions.

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n dragonfly -l app.kubernetes.io/name=dragonfly
kubectl get events -n dragonfly --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Improvement of Security Joint Assessment" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: The project seems to overly trust different components in its architecture.   It would be helpful to do things like ensure non-repudiation via signing many types of data that are sent.   For instance, the secure hashes about which content to retrieve are only protected with transport layer security.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with dragonfly installed or the issue environment reproducible.
